name: SSHCustom-Magisk
author: SSHCustom Team
description: WebUI for SSHCustom-Magisk — route Android TCP traffic through an SSH tunnel with transparent proxying. Manage profiles, monitor tunnel health, and test latency.
contentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self' data: blob: {domain}; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' {domain}; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' {domain}; connect-src *; img-src *;
